name: Sarah & Mike Jenkins
goals: Comfortably transport three kids and luggage
Low maintenance cost and high warranty coverage

name: Alex Thompson
goals: Establish low monthly lease or loan payment
Minimize hidden delivery charges and document fees
pain_points: Dealer add-ons like nitrogen tires or paint sealant
Being pushed to look at higher trim models

Ensure advanced connectivity like Apple CarPlay and digital key
pain_points: Sales representatives who do not understand mechanical specs

name: Elena Rostova
pain_points: Vague explanations of battery warranty and degradation
